source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-151 Manufacturing Information/Attachment 1.3 A-PMCP-5-010 Manufacturing process chart F1417MCW.xlsx

document.title: 제조공정도 / Process Manufacture Control Plan
document.documentType: Manufacturing process chart / Process Manufacture Control Plan

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturing process control plan for models F1417MCW / F4335-AW, document A-PMCP-5-010, Rev.1 dated 2022.12.07.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports manufacturing information by defining process steps, equipment/JIGs, materials, work controls, inspection criteria, records, and related internal standards.
keyPoints: Document number is A-PMCP-5-010 and model names are F1417MCW / F4335-AW.
Revision history lists 신규 등록 on 2022.09.20 and process content addition on 2022.12.07.
Process controls cover receiving, IQC, assembly, electronic testing, aging, final test, electrical safety inspection, labeling/packing, packing inspection, and shipment.
Final Test includes X-ray image inspection and detector performance inspection for DQE, MTF, NPS.
Electrical Safety Inspection includes leakage current, dielectric withstand voltage, ground resistance, and power input tests.

evidence.claim: The document applies to models F1417MCW and F4335-AW.
Revision 1 added Main PBA Chip Bonder process content on 2022.12.07.
evidence.evidenceText: 1,,,2022.12.07,, Main PBA Chip Bonder 공정 추가 내용 기입

evidence.claim: The IQC process performs incoming inspection and certificate confirmation for incoming goods.
evidence.evidenceText: IQC (수입 검사) ... 입고품 입고검사 ... 입고시 성적서 확인

evidence.claim: The electronic test checks power-on dark image acquisition, wired/wireless communication, firmware, and MAC address.
evidence.evidenceText: Electronic Test ... 전원 ON, Dark 영상 취득 ... 유/무선 통신확인 ... firmware & Mac Adress 확인

evidence.claim: Aging Test applies 40℃ for 6 hours while acquiring dark images.
Final Test includes X-ray image inspection and detector performance inspection for DQE, MTF, and NPS.
evidence.evidenceText: Final Test ... X-ray 영상 검사 ... Detector 성능 검사 - DQE, MTF, NPS 등

evidence.claim: Electrical Safety Inspection includes leakage current, dielectric withstand voltage, ground resistance, and power input tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrical Safety Inspection ... 누설 전류 시험 ... 내전압 시험 ... 접지 저항 시험 ... 전원 입력 시험

evidence.claim: Shipment verifies product packing condition and specifications and checks destination information.
evidence.evidenceText: 출하 ... 제품 포장 상태 및 사양 확인 ... 출고지 정보 확인 할 것

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text.
Source metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic while the source path references CE MDR; the document text itself does not resolve the authority.
The extracted table text contains OCR or spreadsheet conversion errors such as Paenl, Contect, Stiker, Blcok, and Shgeet.
Process numbering repeats 21 and 22 before continuing to 23.
